case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EVA ENEIDA PALMA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOSEFINA FLORES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMA, EVA ENEIDA $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,385.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,670.19 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, EVA ENEIDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED APR-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, EVA ENEIDA
